name: Jim Barnett Park
description: Jim Barnett Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Winchester, VA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights, wheelchair accessibility, and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Shenandoah University Tennis Courts
description: Shenandoah University Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Winchester, VA. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are private.
